FAILED Lib/test/test_bisect.py::TestBisect::test_bisect_right

================================ FAILURES ===================================
___________ TestBisect::test_bisect_right ____________

Lib/test/test_bisect.py:112: in test_bisect_right
    self.assertEqual(bisect_right([1, 2, 3, 3, 4], 3), 4)
AssertionError: 2 != 4

Expected insertion point 4 (after all occurrences of 3) but got 2
(before the first occurrence of 3). bisect_right is returning the
left insertion point instead of the right one, suggesting the
comparison operator was changed from > to >= in the binary search loop.
